title: astragalus san-romani
intro: Astragalus san-romani, also known as San Romani milk vetch, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Astragalus san-romani are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, terpenoids, and alkaloids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of using Astragalus san-romani include enhancing immune function, reducing inflammation and stress, and improving cardiovascular health, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Astragalus san-romani include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
